name: Churchill Capital Corp VII Warrants
summary: Churchill Capital Corp VII Warrants are securities that give the holder the right, but not the obligation, to purchase shares of Churchill Capital Corp VII at a specified price within a specific period. Churchill Capital Corp VII is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) that was formed to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The warrants exist as part of the initial public offering structure of the SPAC.
